arc_function: Initialize protagonist-transmigration into game-mechanic world; establish sect-survival stakes; deliver system-tutorial payoff through quest-chain completion; plant cultivation-advantage seeds against overwhelming external threats
dominant_engine: Sect-Building System (gamified leadership management with quest rewards, territory confirmation, blood-binding mechanics)
state_progression: protagonist inherits failing small_faction leadership during crisis
external rival_faction publicly humiliates protagonist establishing power imbalance
successor_dialogue during funeral cements commitment to impossible task
protagonist gains transmigration system_interface through status-threshold trigger
protagonist completes multi-step quest chain (find_object → interact_landmark → blood_bind)
territory confirmation visualized through energy spreading from landmark
newbie_package rewards delivered as system motivation payoff
protagonist's cultivation advantage remains hidden from hostile powers
small_faction must survive three_year_mandatory_demon_hunt with insufficient resources
multiple external_powers remain hostile and unaware of protagonist's game-breaking advantage

turning_points.function: Establish underdog position and imminent survival crisis; activate transmigration system through specific status achievement
Deliver system-tutorial payoff via quest-chain completion; establish blood-binding ownership mechanics and territory control visualization

reusable_mechanisms: Character Status Display Panel with transparent interface showing name/sect/position/cultivation/weapon
Multi-step Quest Chain for core mechanics (find_object → interact_landmark → blood_bind)
Blood Binding Ritual for item/treasure ownership
Territory Confirmation Visualization with energy spreading from landmark
Audio Notification System with ping sounds for system events
Quest Flash Warning with red blinking indicator for pending quests
Newbie Package Reward Delivery for motivating first-time completion reward
Pending/Unestablished Slot Display with ——标记 for uncreated elements
failure_modes: Heavy system explanation through internal monologue may slow pacing
Quest completion checklist format risks feeling like mechanical enumeration
Protagonist alone receives game-breaking advantage without immediate conflict pressure
Dependence on game-mechanic satisfaction for reader engagement
Protagonist significantly weaker than every antagonist (ongoing risk)
Organization cannot afford basic tools (resource constraint)
Protagonist cultivation insufficient for stated task (competence gap)

craft_profile.prose_tendencies: System mechanics delivered through transparent interface description rather than narrator exposition; status-panel visuals provide diegetic system explanation; quest chains use checklist framing to simulate game UI; blood-binding ritual employs sensory specificity (drip blood, spiritual connection) for tactile engagement
craft_profile.tension_strategy: Power imbalance established through public humiliation scene; survival stakes defined by three-year deadline against insufficient resources; protagonist's hidden advantage creates dramatic irony while remaining concealed from antagonists
craft_profile.reader_investment_mechanics: System activation mystery in chapter 1 pays off with interactive tutorial in chapter 2; underdog position invites reader to root for system-assisted competence gain; newbie_package creates immediate reward anticipation; unestablished slots create constructive anticipation for future content
